PsExec

PsExec is a Sysinternals command-line utility that enables remote process execution over SMB. It provides an interactive shell on a remote Windows system by copying psexesvc.exe to the target, creating a temporary Windows service, and executing the specified command or process. PsExec is widely used for legitimate administration and is a common technique for lateral movement.

Requirements

  • Membership in the Administrators group on the target host.
  • The ADMIN$ administrative share must be accessible.
  • File and Printer Sharing must be enabled.

CMD Session On The Target

.\PsExec64.exe -i \\FILES04 -u corp\jen -p Nexus123! cmd
